nasb.text: But Nadab and Abihu died before their father and had no sons. So Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests.

esv.text: But Nadab and Abihu died before their father and had no children, so Eleazar and Ithamar became the priests.

cnv.text: 拿答和亞比戶比他們的父親早死，又沒有兒子；所以以利亞撒和以他瑪作了祭司。

ccb.text: 拿答和亚比户比父亲先死，而且没有留下儿子，因此以利亚撒和以他玛做了祭司。
